dashboard.label: Today
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Today","description":"Daily health snapshot","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_person_list"},"options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"}]},"encoding":{"value":"primary.person_id","label":"primary.person_name"}}},"dataSources":{"ds_readiness":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval score=readiness_score, hrv_bal=round(hrv_balance,0), temp_dev=round(temp_deviation,2), tempcolor=case(abs(temp_dev)<=0.5,"#4CAF50",abs(temp_dev)<=1.0,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A")
| table score, hrv_bal, temp_dev, tempcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Readiness — latest (score/HRV/temp)"},"ds_sleep":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_sleep sleep_score=* person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval score=sleep_score
| table score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score — latest"},"ds_activity":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval score=activity_score, distance_km=round(distance_m/1000,2)
| table score, steps, active_calories, distance_km, inactivity_alerts","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Activity — latest"},"ds_spo2":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=spo2 person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,1), spo2color=case(spo2_avg>=95,"#4CAF50",spo2_avg>=90,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A")
| table spo2_avg, spo2color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"SpO2 — latest"},"ds_resting_hr":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$"
| where bpm<=200
| dedup timestamp
| head 288
| stats min(bpm) as resting_hr
| table resting_hr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resting HR — latest"},"ds_contributors":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval "Activity Balance"=round(readiness_contrib_activity_balance,0), "Body Temp"=round(readiness_contrib_body_temp,0), "HRV Balance"=round(hrv_balance,0), "Prev Day Activity"=round(readiness_contrib_previous_day_activity,0), "Prev Night"=round(readiness_contrib_previous_night,0), "Recovery Index"=round(readiness_contrib_recovery_index,0), "Resting HR"=round(readiness_contrib_resting_hr,0), "Sleep Balance"=round(readiness_contrib_sleep_balance,0)
| table "Activity Balance","Body Temp","HRV Balance","Prev Day Activity","Prev Night","Recovery Index","Resting HR","Sleep Balance"
| transpose
| rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score
| sort -score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Readiness contributors"},"ds_score_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` person_id="$person$" (sleep_score=* OR readiness_score=* OR activity_score=*)
| dedup id
| eval date=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d"), adj_score=coalesce(sleep_score,readiness_score,activity_score), cat=case(isnotnull(sleep_score),"Sleep",isnotnull(readiness_score),"Readiness",isnotnull(activity_score),"Activity",true(),null())
| where isnotnull(cat)
| stats avg(adj_score) as score by cat, date
| xyseries date, cat, score
| sort date","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Score trends (sleep/readiness/activity)"},"ds_sleep_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type="long_sleep" person_id="$person$"
| dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval sleep_hours=round(total_sleep_min/60,1)
| table sleep_hours","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep duration — latest"},"ds_viewer":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Current viewer","options":{"query":"`widx` person_id="$person$"
| stats latest(person_name) as pn dc(person_id) as np
| eval greeting=case(np>1,"Household — all people",np=1 AND isnotnull(pn) AND pn!="","Good day, ".pn,true(),"Good day")
| table greeting"}},"ds_person_list":{"type":"ds.search","name":"People for the picker (registry)","options":{"query":"| inputlookup wearable_person_profile
| eval person_name=coalesce(person_name, person_id)
| sort person_name
| table person_id person_name"}}},"visualizations":{"readiness_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Readiness","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Readiness Score"},"sleep_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4263B8"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Sleep Score"},"activity_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Activity","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Activity Score"},"hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"hrv_bal","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":42,"label":"HRV Balance","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrv_bal')","align":"left"},"title":"HRV Balance"},"rhr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_hr"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Resting HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Resting Heart Rate"},"temp_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_dev","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('tempcolor') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Temp Deviation","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_dev')","align":"left"},"title":"Skin Temp Deviation"},"spo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2"},"options":{"majorField":"spo2_avg","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2color') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":42,"label":"SpO2","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2_avg')","align":"left"},"title":"Blood Oxygen"},"sleep_dur_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"sleep_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Total Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('sleep_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Total Sleep"},"steps_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"steps","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Steps","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('steps')","align":"left"},"title":"Steps Today"},"cal_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"active_calories","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Active Cal","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" kcal","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('active_calories')","align":"left"},"title":"Active Calories"},"contributors_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_contributors"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Readiness Contributors"},"score_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_score_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"date","seriesColors":["#4CAF50","#4263B8","#F4A422"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Score Trends"},"viewer_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"","options":{"majorValue":"> primary | seriesByName('greeting') | lastPoint()","sparklineDisplay":"off","trendDisplay":"off","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","numberPrecision":0},"dataSources":{"primary":"ds_viewer"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp","input_person"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"viewer_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":1400,"h":48}},{"item":"readiness_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":80,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"sleep_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":330,"y":80,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"activity_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":640,"y":80,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"hrv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":300,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"rhr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":255,"y":300,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"temp_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":490,"y":300,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"spo2_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":725,"y":300,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"sleep_dur_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":450,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"steps_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":330,"y":450,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"cal_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":640,"y":450,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"contributors_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":950,"y":80,"w":470,"h":490}},{"item":"score_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":590,"w":1400,"h":390}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":950,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/wearables/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
